calendar.matters:
Petition 1) For Instructions Determining That The Proposed Actions Of The Trustees Are Not A Breach Of Trust, And 2)For An Order That The Beneficiary Vacate Property Partially Owned By The Trust
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ray Yetka, in court, for and with Oscar Coronado, and Kenia Pleitez-Williams, Petitioners.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition. The court advises that it is not comfortable granting all the features of the proposed order and that its tentative ruling is to grant the request for instructions to authorize the trustees to sell the Estate's real property including Arturo's unit. Counsel requests clarification of the court's tentative ruling. Counsel is advised which feature of the proposed order the court is inclined to grant and which features it intends to deny and that modifications to the proposed order will be made accordingly. No objections to the preceding are presented.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition 1) For Instructions Determining That The Proposed Actions Of The Trustees Are Not A Breach Of Trust, And 2)For An Order That The Beneficiary
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
